reviews.comment:
Buen servicio, ahora bien.. los dispenser deberían tener todas las diferentes clases de combustibles y no que el conductor se mueva a buscar el que tiene o desea.

(Translated by Google)
Good service, however... the dispensers should have all the different types of fuel and not make the driver move around to look for the one they have or want.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10933277104463478772/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJeU1Yc2NBEAE

reviews.comment:
Muchas veces por la cantidad de clientes se demora la atención pero es justificada. La atención del personal en su mayoría muy cordiales. Altamente recomendable

(Translated by Google)
Due to the high volume of customers, service can sometimes be delayed, but this is understandable. The staff is mostly very friendly. Highly recommended.
